_comment: Investor FAQ seed for the investor_faq table (/investor/faq). All entries are prospect-tier (visible to every gated viewer) and published. Source: the finalized Investor FAQ data-room doc, 2026-06-18.

faq.question: What is Luxury Lifestyle Vault?
faq.answer: A concierge wardrobe-management platform for affluent clients — secure storage, seasonal rotation, professional cleaning coordination, and on-demand delivery of luxury wardrobes, under a documented chain of custody and fully insured.

faq.question: What problem does it solve?
faq.answer: Affluent clients with large wardrobes across multiple homes and seasons lack a trusted, insured, white-glove way to store, maintain, rotate, and retrieve their clothing. LLV is that trusted custodian and concierge.

faq.question: How does the model work?
faq.answer: Members subscribe to a seasonal tier and place on-demand requests. Items move through a bi-directional Wisconsin–Arizona corridor: intake, secure storage, professional cleaning, seasonal rotation, delivery and returns.

faq.question: Who is the customer?
faq.answer: Affluent individuals and households, initially along the Wisconsin–Arizona "snowbird" corridor. The founding-member pilot launches in the Scottsdale market in October 2026.

faq.question: How does LLV make money?
faq.answer: Recurring membership — Seasonal Essentials ($299) and Seasonal Premier ($599) — plus per-request fees for on-demand services.

faq.question: What is the traction?
faq.answer: The founding-member pilot launches October 2026 in Scottsdale, targeting 10–15 founding members. Founding-member outreach and pipeline development are underway ahead of launch; specific commitments will be reported as the cohort is confirmed.

faq.question: What are you raising, and for what?
faq.answer: LLV is raising $500,000 on a post-money SAFE. The round funds roughly 18–24 months of runway, allocated to operations and hiring (45%), pilot and corridor launch (15%), platform (13%), insurance and legal (12%), and marketing and contingency (15%). It is sized to carry LLV through the founding-member pilot and expansion toward three to four corridors. The valuation cap and any discount will be finalized with the lead investor.

faq.question: Who is on the team?
faq.answer: Founder-led with a lean operating team spanning the corridor; founder / CEO plus Arizona operations. See the Leadership & Team page.

faq.question: How are members' items protected?
faq.answer: Bailee and general-liability insurance cover items in LLV's custody and in transit, under a documented chain of custody. LLV records owner-provided values and never authenticates or appraises items.

faq.question: What is the technology?
faq.answer: A custom member and investor platform (Next.js, Supabase, Stripe, Resend, Inngest, on Vercel) with tiered, NDA-gated access. See the Technology overview.

faq.question: Who are the partners?
faq.answer: Professional garment-care partners (for example RAVE FabriCARE and European Couture Cleaners) and resale through The RealReal.

faq.question: What are the key risks?
faq.answer: Operational scaling, insurance and liability, regulatory steps (entity formation, SMS compliance), and competition. These are mitigated through insurance, documented processes, and a staged pilot.

faq.question: How do I get access or ask more?
faq.answer: Reach out through the investor portal's Contact page or the "Book a call" action.
